<!--
Thanks for contributing! Keep the diff focused on a single concern.
See CONTRIBUTING.md for setup, coding standards, and the full checklist.
-->

## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change, and why? -->

## Related issue

<!-- e.g. Closes #123. For anything non-trivial, please link the issue you discussed first. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor / chore
- [ ] CI / build

## Checklist

- [ ] The diff is minimal and scoped to a single concern.
- [ ] `pnpm verify` passes (lint + typecheck + TypeScript-only check).
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes.
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes (and `pnpm build:worker` if the worker changed).
- [ ] `docker compose build` passes.
- [ ] New user-facing strings are added to **both** `en.ts` and `fr.ts`.
- [ ] Docs (README / CONTRIBUTING) are updated if behaviour or setup changed.
- [ ] Commits follow [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/).
- [ ] No secrets or personal data are included in the diff.

## Notes for reviewers

<!-- Anything worth calling out: trade-offs, follow-ups, screenshots, etc. -->
